notes: Game doesn't start, didn't try workarounds. This game works on staging perfectly, without any workaround, why not proton?!
title: Lara Croft and the Guardian of Light

notes: It's a DRM issue (CEG which is not yet supported by Proton). If you replace lcgol.exe by a cracked one, it works perfectly.
